title: Organize Views per User

posts.author: jasonb1 (Jason)
posts.cookedHtml:
Description

each user in an organization can have views created for them on the same board & that they can choose which one is a default view. Currently there is no option for different users to see different views.

What are you trying to achieve

This would allow for “sales” to view different boards than “Ops” or “management” etc. & each board would work more efficiently. Currently, if there are tioo many views it gets overloaded so this would also allow each user to create their own view for theuir desired purpose
